name: Sandwiches & Wraps
description: Pita-wrapped sandwiches from Pita Kabab's published menu — falafel, chicken shawarma and kabab.

items.name: Falafel sandwich
items.description: Crisp chickpea falafel folded into warm pita — a naturally vegetarian classic.

items.name: Chicken shawarma sandwich
items.description: Seasoned chicken shawarma carved and wrapped in pita.

faqs.question: What comes on a shawarma sandwich at Pita Kabab?
faqs.answer: Ask at the counter for the current toppings and sauces — sandwiches are made to order. Call (319) 440-3709 if you have questions before you arrive.

faqs.question: Is the falafel sandwich vegetarian?
faqs.answer: Yes — falafel is made from chickpeas and herbs, so the falafel sandwich is a vegetarian option on the published menu.

seo.title: Shawarma, Kabob & Falafel Sandwiches - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Pita sandwiches and wraps at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids: falafel, chicken shawarma and kabab, made to order at the counter. Call (319) 440-3709.

name: Bowls
description: Rice and salad bowls from Pita Kabab's published menu.

items.name: Rice bowls
items.description: Hearty rice-based bowls from the published menu. The full bowl lineup is pending owner confirmation — call for today's options.

crossLinks.anchor: Chicken over rice in Cedar Rapids

seo.title: Mediterranean Bowls - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Rice and salad bowls at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids. Counter-service Mediterranean bowls made to order — call (319) 440-3709 for today's options.

name: Platters
description: Full platters from Pita Kabab's published menu — shawarma, mix grill and seafood mix grill.

items.name: Shawarma platter
items.description: Carved shawarma served platter-style with sides.

items.name: Mix grill platter
items.description: A sampler platter of grilled meats.

items.name: Seafood mix grill
items.description: A grilled seafood platter from the published menu.

faqs.question: How many people does a platter feed?
faqs.answer: Platters are individual dinners; for groups, ask about catering trays when you call (319) 440-3709.

seo.title: Grilled Kabob & Shawarma Platters - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Kabob, shawarma, mix grill and seafood platters at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids — full meals from the published menu. Call (319) 440-3709.

name: Mediterranean Delight
description: Mezze and traditional specialties from Pita Kabab's published menu — hummus, foul, mfatakeh, kalaya and chicken liver.

items.name: Hummus
items.description: Classic chickpea and tahini dip served with pita.

items.name: Foul
items.description: Slow-simmered fava beans — a Levantine breakfast-and-anytime staple.

faqs.question: What is in the Mediterranean Delight section?
faqs.answer: It is the mezze and traditional-specialties corner of the published menu: hummus, foul, mfatakeh, kalaya and chicken liver. Ask the counter about each day's preparations.

faqs.question: Are there vegetarian options?
faqs.answer: Yes — hummus and foul are vegetarian, and the falafel sandwich on the sandwiches menu is vegetarian too.

seo.title: Mediterranean Delight - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Hummus, foul, mfatakeh, kalaya and chicken liver — the mezze and traditional specialties section of Pita Kabab's menu in Cedar Rapids.

name: Wings
description: Seasoned wings from Pita Kabab's published menu, including a ten-piece party size.

items.name: Party wings (10 pc)
items.description: A ten-piece order of seasoned wings from the published menu — a group-friendly pick.

seo.title: Wings - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Seasoned wings at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids, including ten-piece party wings — order at the counter or call (319) 440-3709.

name: Kids Meals
description: Smaller portions for younger guests from Pita Kabab's published kids menu.

items.name: Kids meal
items.description: Kid-sized portions from the published kids menu. Current combos are pending owner confirmation — ask at the counter.

seo.title: Kids Meals - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Kids meals at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids — smaller portions for younger guests, made to order. Call (319) 440-3709 with questions.

name: Desserts
description: Desserts from Pita Kabab's published menu, led by baklava.

items.name: Baklava
items.description: Layered phyllo pastry with nuts and syrup — the classic Levantine dessert.

faqs.question: Does Pita Kabab have baklava?
faqs.answer: Yes — baklava is on the published desserts menu. Call (319) 440-3709 to check today's availability before you visit.

seo.title: Baklava & Desserts - Pita Kabab
seo.description: Baklava and desserts at Pita Kabab in Cedar Rapids — finish a shawarma or kabob meal the traditional way. Call (319) 440-3709.
